Conducting Body: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
Notes: Clearing the Final exam and completing articleship grants the professional CA license to practice.

Conducting Body: Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
Notes: Grants the statutory license to act as a certified Company Secretary.

Conducting Body: Institute of Cost Accountants of India (ICMAI)
Notes: Grants the license for Cost and Management Accounting practice.
Mandatory open-book exam. Must be cleared within 2 years of provisional state bar enrollment to practice law permanently.
Grants the statutory license to draft and file patents legally in India.
Grants the statutory license to practice as a Trademark Agent.
Mandatory screening test for Indian citizens holding foreign medical degrees to get an NMC/State Medical Council license.
Mandatory screening test for foreign dental graduates to practice in India.
Replacing FMGE and NEET-PG. Will act as the single qualifying exam for medical licensure in India.
Newly mandated exit and licensing exam for Ayush medical graduates to register with state councils.
Newly introduced mandatory exam to register as a Pharmacist in State Pharmacy Councils.
Required to obtain Commercial Pilot License (CPL) and Airline Transport Pilot License (ATPL).
Mandatory written modules to get the license to certify aircraft airworthiness.

Exam Name: MEO (Marine Engineer Officer) Class II & IV
Notes: Certificate of Competency (CoC) exams required for Merchant Navy officers.
The primary state-level licensing exam. Conducted by individual states (e.g., Gujarat BOE, Kerala BOE) but the license is valid Pan-India.
Grants the license to act as an official Customs Broker under the Customs Act.

Conducting Body: Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI)
Notes: Mandatory to practice as a Resolution Professional in NCLT corporate insolvency cases.
Mandatory for professionals (Engineers, CAs) to conduct statutory financial or asset valuations.
Series exams (e.g., Mutual Fund Distributor, Investment Adviser) legally mandated by SEBI to work in capital markets.
Mandatory certification under the Energy Conservation Act to conduct statutory energy audits.
Mandatory Food Safety Supervisor training and certification for food business operators.
Mandatory to sell life, general, or health insurance policies in India.

Conducting Body: Indian Institute of Banking and Finance (IIBF)
Notes: Premier professional certifications required for internal promotions and increments in Indian banks.
Passing all core and fellowship exams grants the statutory license to sign actuarial valuations in India.
